PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -qiE 'send|email|post' || echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.md|\.txt'; then python3 ~/.claude/hooks/pre-send-review.py "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" "$CLAUDE_COMMAND"; fi
PreToolUse.description: GFV Voice/Quality Gate Check before sending communications or finalizing emails
